Skip to decisions
squiz · /usr/specs/smoke.md

Smoke test — every art form, every shape

Exercises raw SVG, named wireframes, every DSL primitive, auto-art defaults, explicit no-art suppression, and the v0.8.0 composition recipe. Theme should auto-derive per repo.

5 decisions·copy json when done
the spec

Visual previews come from named library wf* references and dsl primitives; when nothing fits, the agent can rely on the auto-art when omitted default or explicit no-art (art"none") the art slot entirely. The synthesis lives in composition recipe (v080): raw <svg> that embeds library + DSL primitives via <use href='…'/> + custom labels + annotation marks.

Decisions

00 / 05 resolved
01.
of 05

Named library: wf:* references

All from the registry — each option is one finished library glyph.

02.
of 05

DSL primitives

Each option exercises one DSL form in isolation.

03.
of 05

Auto-art when omitted

No art field set — the renderer falls back to per-letter abstract patterns. This is what happens when you SKIP authoring art; production usage should compose instead (see the composed squiz at the end).

04.
of 05

Explicit no-art (art:"none")

These options have art:"none" — the art slot should be hidden entirely (cards collapse).

05.
of 05

Composition recipe (v0.8.0)

Each option is a bespoke <svg> with embedded <use href='wf:…'/> + <use href='arch:…'/> + a labeled arrow + an annotation primitive. This is the canonical authoring shape; the previous squizzes show the parts in isolation.

end of document squiz · paste json back to continue
00/05
